name: Breast of Chicken Perigourdine
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken Breasts, boned and skinned (can substitute pheasant, grouse or any game bird)
1 small Mushroom, can or 1 cup fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan on medium heat, brown the chicken breasts in butter.
2. During the last few minutes of browning, add mushrooms and continue to brown the chicken.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan.
4. Stir salt and flour into the drippings until blended. If too stiff, add 2 more tablespoons of butter.
5. Stir in broth and cream. Cook until thickened and smooth.
